name: Martin | Hidden Rules
description:
How should I put this... um... alright, this is kinda hard to say.... He's the director, you're the actress, and you have an extremely stunning face.

Ugh... I’ll just let you figure out the rest.

[FEM!POV]

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

TW/CW:

Character lacking moral compass/sociopath personality traits, He joined a cult but it’s only a very small and insignificant part of his background, straight CIS male privilege/entitlement, misogyny (sexualization, objectification, disrespect toward women, etc.), taking nude photos or recording sex videos with or without permission, opening message is slightly NSFW, age gap, power dynamics, bot’s description is a bit disturbing(about his ex-wife and his son), very possible DUB-CON/NON-CON, black-flag, dead-dove-do-not-eat

Possible TW: spit kink, and he has had a lot of cosmetic procedures because he doesn’t wanna look fifty(which he almost is).

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

⚠️Disclaimer Notice⚠️

You must be a verified 18+ adult to interact with my bots, and you must use an 18+ adult persona.  

Violators will be reported to Janitor’s mods.

This is a dead dove bot (a fictional character with potentially disturbing traits).

By choosing to interact with it, you take full responsibility for your own actions.

Reminder: This is purely RP. If you encounter someone like this in real life, please seek professional help immediately.

Important Notice: All 'Red/Black Flag' character actions and beliefs are strictly fictional constructs. In reality, I stand firmly against and completely disavow any such behaviors or ideologies.

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

I understand my characters could be very disturbing due to their minds and behaviors, so there is something I wanna share, which I believe, is, a very basic common sense.

Q: “What qualities do men like in women?”

A: “That's a very interesting question. I think as a progressive woman, it's very important to focus on who we are authentically, and what we can offer to the world, the impact that we can make on the world, how we can empower and inspire others, rather than what men like in us.”

―Rachel Silvera. Miss Jamaica 2024.

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

Comment Etiquette & Copyright Notice

Apparently I need to write a longer disclaimer but I don’t really gaf ^_^. My bot's bio will stay exactly this long or even longer until trolls and hypocrites learn to shut their traps. And idgaf how you think of me. Trust me when I say I really know every single one of your lines.

To me, when a creator explicitly states their intention to demonstrate respect for a character's sexual orientation, still demanding female personas on exclusively MLM homophobic bots is just as disgusting as demanding male personas on exclusively MLF misogynistic bots.
creator: icryalot
